query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('stock_critical', 'stock_low', 'request_created', 'request_updated', 'request_completed', 'task_assigned', 'task_due_soon', 'system') NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  referenceId INT,
  referenceType VARCHAR(50),
  actionUrl VARCHAR(512),
  isRead BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX notification_user_idx (userId),
  INDEX notification_user_read_idx (userId, isRead),
  INDEX notification_type_idx (type)
);

  userId INT NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('stock_critical', 'stock_low', 'request_created', 'request_updated', 'request_completed', 'task_assigned', 'task_due_soon', 'system') NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  referenceId INT,
  referenceType VARCHAR(50),
  actionUrl VARCHAR(512),
  isRead BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX notification_user_idx (userId),
  INDEX notification_user_read_idx (userId, isRead),
  INDEX notification_type_idx (type)
);
